coalition promoting initiative expand Medicaid coverage Montana and big increase tobacco taxes help pay for has filed complaint charging its opponents with illegal campaign activities.
The complaint was filed Monday with the state Commissioner Political Practices Tara Veazey, initiative campaign manager for Healthy Montana, coalition health-care organizations and other groups that pushing Initiative 185, which would raise the state tax cigarettes pack.
Those activities include the failure report expenditures made the campaign against I-185, and the use automated telephone solicitations, commonly known "robocalls," which are illegal Montana unless live operator first obtains permission deliver the recorded message.
The charges are aimed Montanans Against Tax Hikes, group based Helena, Decision Point Consulting, based Ohio, "and any other now unknown entity committee" that has financially supported the illegal activities.
Commissioner Political Practices Jeff Mangan said the complaint was filed Monday, but still has examined determine whether meets all the requirements accepted his office. said that decision should made Wednesday.
Veasey said interview Monday that the complaint won't have any bearing I-185, which will appear the ballot November supporters manage collect verified signatures from least 25,468 registered voters statewide June 22.
She said the complaint was filed force dark-money groups publicly revealed, and let Montanans know who spending money influence elections.
"We just want make sure that's being disclosed, early and often possible," she said.
Besides raising state taxes cigarettes pack, I-185 would increase taxes smokeless tobacco percent and create new taxes vaping and products.
also would extend Montana's expanded Medicaid program, which provides government-funded health care more than 94,000 low-income Montanans, past 2019.
Denowh, the former director the Montana Republican Party and president the Montana Group, political consulting firm based Helena, did not return calls seeking comment, but told Yellowstone Public Radio was still reviewing the complaint and had comment.
According the complaint, "several individuals" reported receiving robocalls around May offering them $100 take part focus group. Veazey says the complaint that when she called the number provided, her call was answered voicemail service for Decision Point Consulting.
"Clearly," the complaint says, "the hiring out state company produce robocall expenditure," creating and conducting focus group meeting. But Decision Point Consulting has not filed C-2, spending disclosure statement with the state.
"If MATH paid for this poll conducted, should have been reported the C-6 disclosure report that was due May 21. ... MATH filed form C-6 June but this report failed include any the above-described expenditures," the complaint said.
That C-6 report, fact, lists only two things: donations totaling $325 and debts $1,700.
"The failure opponents I-185 file any the required financial reports disclose any information about their income sources expenditures represents clear disregard for Montana's reporting requirements and warrants full and immediate investigation," the complaint says.

There was plenty grumbling about the Advance Report Durable Goods for January 2010 that was released today. The headline number showed new orders but ex-transportation, new orders were actually down 0.6%.
you're overweight tech, like am, though, you would smiling happily.
I'll run through few charts and you'll see why. Let's start looking shipments for the tech sector whole and than for the sub-sectors computers, semiconductors and communications equipment.
With the great improvement shipments, it's disappointing see Tech lagging other sectors like Materials and Consumer Discretionary. Some would argue, however, that shipments are the past, and stocks move based future performance.
that's truly the case, Tech might still the place be. Take look these charts showing new orders.

(Prospective) Tenant Life Support!
ran into friend mine recently who helps manage very large portfolio rental properties. She always has the funniest stories tell, and just had pass this one on.
They had running for rental property nice area town. was typical bedroom bread and butter house and there had been lot interest this particular property. She said that until just before closing, she had the usual run the mill tenant applications.
Then the very last minute before closing, lady ran into the office waving cash and said she had put her application today. She told the property manager that she was going have move quickly she currently lived two story house with the bedrooms the second floor. The applicant said this house was the right location, and she reiterated that needed least one first floor bedroom. She said this house would perfect!
The prospective tenant began filling out the application and when was complete my, friend looked over everything noting that the income given was for her and her husband. Wanting get much information possible, she asked her why she needed move quickly. This nice lady said that, "Her husband would off life support any day now, and when came home from the hospital was going need first floor bedroom that would accommodate his hospital bed would need for his long recovery".
After friend recovered from the shock hearing was currently ICU life support, she gently asked the applicant what she would some chance didn't recover. The tenant said she was sure was going recover but might take some time. She just needed house with first floor bedroom. friend pointed out that she didn't have sufficient income herself rent the property.
how did they leave it?
friend the property manager told her see she could find co-signer and get back with her. She never heard back from the lady really don't know what happened.
Wow, that's sad situation. But makes sense that you need rent someone who can pay. suspect she probably found another home rent hopefully works out for her and her husband (and the landlord).
hope too Mike. the end the day, you have have tenant that can pay the rent that you can pay for the house. would much worse let them move (knowing that they couldn't pay) and then have evict them. one wants that.

Former Farro Fresh's marketing manager, Ahi McKenzie, has been named Foodstuffs' new external relations manager. Before Farro, she has been head marketing and design The Aromatherapy Company. HP, which the abbreviation Hewlett-Packard, one the world's major companies. headquartered Palo Alto, California. widely known for variety products encompassing both hardware and software.
HP, company has rich history computer technology. Although the company born 1939, wasn't until much later the 60s that the company actually started delve into manufacturing minicomputers. Laptops came lot later and the first was the HP-110 1984. More products followed this lineup after this.
HP, present, offers two major laptop series. These are the Pavilion and Envy series notebooks. The Pavilion lineup was introduced 2004, with the Envy lineup coming almost years later.
When comes India, does have huge presence the country. The company easily ranks within the top five brands that are available India. There huge network retail stores and even company showrooms where products are available. Even popular ecommerce platforms offer discounts and offers for laptops.
Most students and professionals prefer HP, mainly because its reputation brand and also the quality products offered. Many the laptops models are also reasonably priced, which means that they are largely affordable many buyers.
offers some the best laptops models and their design really stands out among the crowd. The Envy series laptops are more elegant than the Pavilion series. This also because they are tad bit expensive.
Most the construction polycarbonate metal alloys. This ensures that devices are light weight, but also strong enough stand permissible shocks. You can expect the weight kilograms most. Ultrabooks tend lot lighter though.
HP's laptops have screen sizes from inches. The technology used screen construction IPS LED. They are also mostly HD/FHD terms resolution, thus offering clear viewing and graphics. Many the devices also offer touchscreen functionality.
The keypad full sized one and offers good typing experience. For devices that are priced highly, the keyboard often backlit one and makes typing easier. Besides, touchpad that offers gesture based controls also very good have. Many the laptops can also operated various modes, i.e. hybrid models.
HP's laptops come various different color options, although black, red, white and silver are the more commonly seen models.
Laptops from the house are known offer many different features. start with, models come with both AMD and Intel processors. The Intel range largely consists Core i3/i5/i7 present times, along with Celeron and Pentium Dual Core ones. AMD processors the series are the other option. Most models have inbuilt GPU rely discrete units from Nvidia AMD Radeon.
For memory, the laptops are equipped with 8GB RAM. Storage capacities are also pretty high and range between 500GB and 1.5TB.
host other options can found these laptops. Most the devices are provided with Bang and Olufsen Dolby audio. web camera can also found all the devices.
All laptops have Bluetooth and Wi-Fi connectivity. Along with these, you can get USB ports, HDMI port, Ethernet port and 3.5mm universal headphone jack. The models also come with DVD writers.
The battery backup from laptops largely favorable.
has recently launched the EliteBook 1020 G1. The device pretty familiar the MacBook and also made aluminum and magnesium alloys.
